# Documenter Settings

## Placement rules
- active agent workflow docs: `.github/agents/**`
- active architecture rules: `docs/architecture/**`
- active BAB rules: `docs/bab/**`
- task outputs and historical material: `docs/archive/**` or `.github/agents/archive/**`

## Documentation rules
- shorten mandatory-first docs aggressively
- replace duplicated prose with references
- keep indexes current
- do not reference templates or tooling that do not exist

## Required deliverables
- summary of canonical docs changed
- archive or redirect actions taken
- links that were updated to point to the new source of truth
